remember: Students will be able to recall the plot and characters of the story 'Deep Water'.
Students will be able to remember the author's use of literary devices and techniques in the story.
understand: Students will be able to understand the themes and messages conveyed in the story 'Deep Water'.
Students will be able to comprehend the psychological effects of fear and phobias on individuals as depicted in the story.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of fear, courage, and human psychology to real-life situations.
Students will be able to use the story as a basis to discuss and analyze the importance of facing one's fears and overcoming phobias.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the character of the protagonist and his experiences with fear and swimming.
Students will be able to critically evaluate the author's portrayal of the human psyche and the effects of fear on an individual's life.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to develop an understanding of the story and its themes.
To analyze the character of the protagonist and his experiences with fear and swimming.
To comprehend the literary devices and techniques used by the author in the story.
board_exam_objectives: To answer comprehension questions based on the story 'Deep Water'.
To analyze and interpret the story, identifying themes, characters, and literary devices.
To write a character sketch of the protagonist, exploring his experiences and emotions.
